---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: feature
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to build. -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Why should it be added? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you think it should work. Include mockups or examples if helpful. -->

## Affected Area

<!-- Which part of the codebase does this touch? -->

- [ ] Frontend — UI/pages
- [ ] Frontend — API layer (`src/lib/`)
- [ ] Backend — Routes / Controllers
- [ ] Backend — Database / Prisma schema
- [ ] Backend — AI / LLM
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Implementation Notes

<!-- Any technical details, edge cases, or constraints to be aware of. -->

## Checklist before claiming

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I understand the scope fits within one PR
- [ ] I will comment "I'd like to work on this" and wait to be assigned before starting
